define_state.goal_statement: Reduce the inner packaging defect rate from 6% to 2% within the next 6 months.

ctq_list.name: Inner Packaging Defect Rate
ctq_list.description: The percentage of inner packaging that fails to meet quality standards due to defects, aiming for a target of 2%.

ctq_list.name: Rework Rate on Sealing Line
ctq_list.description: The percentage of products that require rework due to defects in the sealing process, aiming for a reduction to 5%.

ctq_list.name: Scrap Cost
ctq_list.description: The total cost incurred due to scrap resulting from defective inner packaging, aiming to reduce costs by 30%.

measures: Monitor defect rates weekly with detailed reporting
Track rework and scrap costs bi-weekly with variance analysis
Conduct regular inspections of sealing equipment with documented findings and action items
early_measure_plan.responsible: Quality Assurance Team, with weekly updates to project stakeholders
